_comment: Example shape of config.json. The real file is created automatically on first run with generated credentials — you normally never edit it by hand; use the web GUI. If you do edit it, stop the service first (the GUI overwrites hand edits).
admin_password_hash: (generated on first run — a hash, never the plaintext password)
cloudflare_api_token: (set via the web GUI — token scoped to Zone / DNS / Edit; leave blank for notification-only mode)
cloudflare_zone_id: (32-char hex ID from the Cloudflare zone Overview page)
ddns_tracked_record_ids: (Cloudflare record IDs toggled on in the DNS Records page)
